<!-- Please use the templates below to create clear, reviewable PRs. -->

## Summary
A short (1-2 sentence) description of what this PR does and why.

## Type of change
Choose one: feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, perf, test, ci, chore

## Changes
- Bullet list of the main changes
- Mention files / modules touched

## How to test
Step-by-step instructions for testing locally (commands, env vars, ports). Include any required seeds or sample requests.

## Checklist
- [ ] I updated tests or added new tests where appropriate
- [ ] I added/updated documentation where needed
- [ ] The change is small and focused

## Notes for the reviewer
Anything special the reviewer should watch for (migration steps, manual DB changes, secrets needed)

<!--
Branch naming: use the conventional prefixes: feat/, fix/, ci/, test/, chore/, docs/
Example: feat/admin-markdown-prefill
Open PRs as "Ready for review" (unless you want feedback early — then use Draft).
-->
